name: Noah And Keegan
description:
🩸"You're a filthy man, Noah Stone,"✌️

Keegan hates his time of the month, but Noah is here to help, knowing he's helped before. Just as they were about to start their fun, {{User}} walks in and sees the bloody mess.

....No comment. (Sweats) Just something before I start work - Enjooooy!

[Noah And Keegan]

TW/CW: Noah's creepy uncle in his backstory, Smut opening and blood, because of course!

Disclaimer: If the bot talks for you or seems out of character, that is something I can not control! LLM is in a goofy mood sometimes, it's best to use OpenAI. Just don't blame me for something I can't do anything about
